rules.description: [Base][Mod] globe/fn → Left Control · Left Control → fn
[Intl] Option+Shift (hold ⌥ alt, tap Shift) → switch input source (Ctrl+Option+Space)
[Edit][Delete] Ctrl+Backspace → delete word backward (Opt+Backspace) · not ghostty/Jump
[Edit][Delete] Ctrl+Delete → delete word forward (Opt+Fwd-Delete) · not ghostty/Jump
[Win][Emoji] Win+. → Emoji & Symbols (Ctrl+Cmd+Space) · not in Jump
[Win][Close] Alt+F4 → close whole window (Cmd+Shift+W) · not in Jump
[Win][Launch] Win tapped alone → Apps launcher (Start key) · not in Jump
[Win][Launch] Win+E → open Finder at home · not ghostty/Jump
[Browser] Ctrl+Click → Cmd+Click (open link in new tab, Windows-style)
[Browser] fn+F5 → Reload page (Cmd+R) · browsers only (plain F5 stays Brightness)
[Browser] Cmd+N → Option+N (Edge: Tab to Window ext; Edge needs Option+letter, rejects Cmd & F-keys) · Edge only
[Browser] Cmd+Shift+N → Option+Shift+N (Edge: Tab to Popup ext; Edge needs Option+letter, rejects Cmd & F-keys) · Edge only
[Block] Cmd+Q → nothing (no accidental quit) · not in Jump
[Block] physical Cmd+W → nothing; globe+W still closes · not in Jump
